storyHook: 在家各房间活动，做饭休息

narrative.when: 周日上午，难得在家待一整天
narrative.where: 甲家，从厨房到客厅到卧室
narrative.who: 甲（住户）· 乙（同住的家人）
narrative.how: 在不同房间走动，做家务和休息交替
narrative.method: 做饭、打扫客厅、整理卧室、晚上一起休息
narrative.event: 甲家里来客人，今天要把房子收拾干净

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I'm back. Let me put this bag down.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good timing. I just started cleaning this room.
turns.zh: 来得正好，我刚在擦这间屋子。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: The sun is so bright today. Look at this room!
turns.zh: 今天太阳真亮，你看这屋子。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes, it is a bit mixed up. We have work to do.
turns.zh: 是啊，有点乱，咱们得干活了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right. Where do we start? The room for cooking first?
turns.zh: 行。从哪儿开始？先做饭的房间？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is a good idea. I will do the plates.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will get the food ready for after.
turns.zh: 那我把食材准备好，晚点用。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Let us have a cup of tea first?

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right. A short rest before the work.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I'll put the kettle on. You take a rest.
turns.zh: 我来烧水，你坐下歇会儿。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Thanks. The tea will give us a start.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Here you go. Not too warm now.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Good. So, after this, we clean the front room?
turns.zh: 好。喝完这个，咱们打扫客厅？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes. The dust on the boards is thick.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will get a wet cloth for that.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right. Let us start with the front room then.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I'll take the cloth and you get the dust thing.
turns.zh: 我拿抹布，你拿那个吸尘的。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good. I will give the boards a quick clean.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: The sun is bright. Dust will be clear.
turns.zh: 太阳很亮，灰尘会很清楚。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes. I will do the floor after you do the boards.
turns.zh: 对，你擦完架子我来吸地。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: These books on the shelf need a new order.
turns.zh: 架子上的书得重新摆一下。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Put them in a line by size? Or by shade?
turns.zh: 按大小排还是按色调排？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: By size, I would say. That looks clean.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right. I will put them in order now.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: The floor is done. What about the window?
turns.zh: 地吸完了，窗户要不要擦？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: The window is good. Let's do the sleeping room after.
turns.zh: 窗户可以。接下来弄卧室吧。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Good idea. The bed needs new covers.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I will get the clean ones from the drawer.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: You take that end. I take this one.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Pull it tight. Good. Now the covers for the head rest.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: These are soft. They will be good for sleep.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: The box for clothes is not in order. Are we to put it right?
turns.zh: 衣柜有点乱，要不要理一下？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Yes. Fold the shirts and put them in groups.
turns.zh: 好。把衬衫叠好，一摞一摞放。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I will do the top shelf. You do the lower one.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right. This room looks much better now.
turns.zh: 行。这房间现在好看多了。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Let's take a rest now. I made some tea.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: That sounds good. My back is a bit stiff.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Take this seat by the window. The sun is warm.
turns.zh: 坐窗边吧，太阳暖洋洋的。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Thank you. This tea is just what I needed.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: After this, we will do the living room floor.
turns.zh: 喝完这个，我们把客厅地板拖了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right. Let's get the cloth and bucket.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I will put warm water and soap in the bucket.
turns.zh: 我来往桶里倒温水和肥皂。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right. I will put the seats out of the way.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: The floor has some marks near the table.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will give that part a good clean.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Let us start from the far end and come back.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Yes. That way we do not walk on wet floor.
turns.zh: 对，这样不会踩到湿地面。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I will do the first part. You take over after.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right. The water is a good heat.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Done. The floor is clean and bright now.
turns.zh: 好了。地板现在又干净又亮。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Good work. The place looks much better now.
turns.zh: 干得好。现在这地方看着好多了。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Let us have a rest before the room?
turns.zh: 房间之前，要不要歇一下？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Good idea. I will make us some tea.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I would like that. My back is a bit tired.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Take a seat. The water will be ready in a minute.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Here is your tea. Go slow, it is warm.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Thanks. This is a good rest.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: After tea, we will do the sleeping room. The bed needs new covers.
turns.zh: 喝完茶，我们弄卧室。床单该换了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right. I will get the clean ones from the box.
turns.zh: 好。我去柜子里拿干净的。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: And I will take the old covers off. Ready when you are.
turns.zh: 我把旧床单撤了。你好了就开干。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Here are the clean covers. They smell good.
turns.zh: 干净床单来了。闻着挺好。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good. Let us put them on together. One side for you, one for me.
turns.zh: 好。咱俩一起套吧。你一边，我一边。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Pull your side tight. I will do the same here.
turns.zh: 你那头拉紧。我这头也一样。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Done. That looks smooth. Now the head rests.
turns.zh: 好了。挺平整。现在弄头靠。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Here are the covers. Put the ends in.
turns.zh: 枕套在这儿。把角塞进去。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Like this? Good. The room looks much better now.
turns.zh: 这样？不错。房间现在顺眼多了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right, put the books back on the shelf?

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes, in order by size. It will look clean.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: All done. The room is ready for men.
turns.zh: 齐活。这房间可以待客了。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Let us go and have a rest in the living room.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Let us put the kettle on.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good idea. I would like a cup of tea.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Me too. Let us take the seats by the window.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: The sun is warm here. Quite a rest.
turns.zh: 这儿太阳暖洋洋的。真放松。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Yes. The house is clean now. No more work.
turns.zh: 是啊。房子干净了。不用再忙了。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: What time will your friends come?

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: About six. We have two hours still.
turns.zh: 大概六点。还有两个小时。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right. I will make some small cakes.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Oh, you are good. I will give you a hand.
turns.zh: 哦，你真好。我帮你打下手。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right. Let us go then.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will get the powder. Where is it?

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Top shelf, left side. I put it there yesterday.
turns.zh: 上层架子，左边。我昨天放那儿的。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Got it. How much do we need?

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Two cups will be enough. And some sugar.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Sugar is in the tin. I will get it.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good. Do we have eggs?

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Yes, six in the box. Three for the cakes.
turns.zh: 有，盒子里六个。三个做蛋糕。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I will do the eggs. You mix the powder.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right. A bit of milk to make it soft.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is a good idea. I will get the milk.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: The mix is ready. What now?

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Put it in the tin. I will heat the oven.
turns.zh: 倒进烤盘里。我去预热烤箱。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Would you like some nuts on top?
turns.zh: 要不要在上面放点坚果？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes, that will make it hard and good to the teeth.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Done. How long in the oven?

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: About twenty minutes. Let's clean this room while we have time.
turns.zh: 大概二十分钟。趁这工夫把房间收拾了吧。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right. I will wash the plates.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: The plates are clean. What about the floor?

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will get the brush. You move the seats.
turns.zh: 我去拿扫帚。你把座位挪开。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is right. The floor is cleaner now.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Let us put the cakes on a plate?
turns.zh: 我们把蛋糕放到盘子里吧？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes, and get the butter out. The men will be here before long.
turns.zh: 好，再把黄油拿出来。人快到了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Oh, my box is ringing. It is them.
turns.zh: 哦，我的盒子响了。是他们。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: What do they say?

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: They are sad. They may come another day.
turns.zh: 他们难过。可以改天再来。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Well then. More cake for us.
turns.zh: 那好吧。咱们多吃点蛋糕。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: True. Let's have a cup of tea and rest.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good idea. I will put the kettle on.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Which tea would you like?

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: The one with flowers. It is soft and sweet.

storyBlurb: 周日上午，甲和乙难得在家一整天。为了迎接晚上的客人，两人从厨房到卧室，忙碌又温馨地收拾着家。
storyScript:
【开场·回家进门】
甲推开家门，把包挂在门边的钩子上。阳光透过客厅的窗帘洒进来，照在略显凌乱的沙发上。乙从厨房探出头，手里还拿着抹布，笑着说今天得好好打扫一番。甲脱下外套，深吸一口气，准备开始一天的忙碌。

【进行·厨房客厅】
甲走进厨房，乙正在水池边洗菜。灶台上摆着几样食材，甲系上围裙，开始切菜。锅里的油热了，甲把切好的蔬菜倒进去，滋啦一声，香气四溢。乙擦干手，端来一壶茶，两人在厨房的小桌旁坐下歇了歇。午后，他们转战客厅。甲把沙发上的抱枕拍松，乙用吸尘器吸走地毯上的碎屑。窗台上的绿植被挪到一边，甲用湿布擦净窗台。阳光照在地板上，反射出柔和的光。

【进行·整理卧室】
下午，两人走进卧室。床单有些皱了，甲和乙各拉一角，一起抖平再铺好。乙把衣柜里的衣服叠整齐，甲则把床头柜上的书摞好。窗外的风轻轻吹动窗帘，卧室渐渐变得整洁。甲从柜子里拿出干净的枕套，乙接过套上枕头。他们相视一笑，满意地看着焕然一新的房间。

【收束·整理就寝】
傍晚，客人还没到，但家里已经焕然一新。甲和乙在客厅的沙发上坐下，泡了两杯热茶。电视开着，声音低低的，两人靠着彼此，聊着今天的琐事。夜幕降临，客人打来电话说临时有事改期了。甲和乙相视一笑，索性早早洗漱，躺进柔软的床铺。窗外的路灯透过窗帘投进淡淡的光，他们闭上眼睛，享受这难得的宁静夜晚。
